# Vertano

> Vertano is a free, open-source batch audio transcription app for macOS,
> Windows, and Linux. Users drag in audio files, whole folders, or downloaded
> YouTube caption files; audio is transcribed locally (Whisper) and saved as a
> .txt transcript next to its source, and caption files (.srt/.vtt) are
> cleaned of YouTube's rolling duplication and translated into timed subtitle
> tracks. Nothing is uploaded. It works fully offline.

Key facts:
- Price: free, no account, no usage limits, open source (github.com/fahdi/vertano)
- Platforms: native Swift app for macOS 15+; Tauri (Rust) app for Windows 10+ and Linux; mobile planned
- Languages: ~100 via Whisper, including first-class Urdu; one-toggle translation to English, plus multi-language transcript translation on device (Apple language packs, about 25 target languages)
- Models: three switchable tiers on macOS: Efficient (fast, single-language), Enhanced (accents and noise), Maximum (multilingual and Indic-language audio with code-switching)
- Captions: drop a downloaded .srt/.vtt (e.g. from yt-dlp or YouTube Studio); Vertano deduplicates rolling auto-captions, retimes them, saves a cleaned track plus translated tracks per selected language; manually authored files pass through untouched
- Formats: wav, mp3, m4a, flac, ogg, opus, aiff, caf, voice memos, audio tracks of mp4/mov/webm video, and .srt/.vtt caption files
- Output: <filename>.txt beside each audio file; <name>.<lang>.srt/.vtt cleaned and translated caption tracks; transcripts also viewable/copyable in the app
- Privacy: all processing on-device; speech models download once on first run
- macOS extras: live recording with rolling transcription, Metal GPU acceleration
- macOS prerequisites: brew install whisper-cpp ffmpeg; Windows/Linux builds bundle the engine
- Known limitation: Apple Translation does not cover Urdu, Bengali, Persian, Punjabi, or Pashto as translation targets; caption files in those languages still get the cleaned track

Downloads: https://github.com/fahdi/vertano/releases/latest
Site: https://vertano.app/
